description: Full bidirectional HeyReach LinkedIn automation integration with Ops tables — push leads to campaigns, pull engagement data back, webhook-driven activity tracking, ops rules automation, multi-sender support, scheduled sync, and LinkedIn activity timeline columns

userStories.title: Database Schema — HeyReach Integration Tables
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I need the database tables for HeyReach integration so that credentials, campaign links, and sync history are properly stored with correct RLS.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration creates heyreach_org_credentials with org_id PK, api_key TEXT NOT NULL
Migration creates heyreach_org_integrations with UNIQUE org_id, connection metadata, last_webhook_received_at
Migration creates heyreach_campaign_links with field_mapping JSONB, sender_column_key, UNIQUE(table_id, campaign_id)
Migration creates heyreach_sync_history with sync_type CHECK, row counts, metadata JSONB
All policies use DROP POLICY IF EXISTS before CREATE POLICY
userStories.notes: Follow exactly the Instantly integration schema pattern

userStories.title: Connection Setup — API Key & Config
userStories.description: As an org admin, I want to connect my HeyReach account by entering my API key so that 60 can access my campaigns and receive webhook data.
acceptanceCriteria: Edge function heyreach-admin handles connect, disconnect, check_status
Connect validates API key via HeyReach API call
HeyReachConfigModal wraps ConfigureModal with API key input and status

userStories.title: Campaign Discovery & Linking
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want to browse my HeyReach campaigns and link one to my ops table so that I can push leads and receive engagement data.
acceptanceCriteria: list_campaigns and get_campaign_details actions on heyreach-admin
Campaign picker with name, status, sender count
Field mapping UI for ops columns to HeyReach fields
Linked campaign shown in ops table toolbar

userStories.title: Sender Account Management
userStories.description: As a sales manager, I want to assign specific LinkedIn sender accounts to individual leads so that outreach comes from the right person.
acceptanceCriteria: heyreach_sender column type with sender dropdown

userStories.title: Webhook Receiver — All Events
userStories.description: As a system, I need to receive and process all HeyReach webhook events so that engagement data flows into ops tables in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: API key auth via URL query parameter
Resolves to ops table rows by LinkedIn URL or email
Webhook URL displayed in config modal

userStories.title: Manual Push — Bulk Action
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want to select rows and push them to a HeyReach campaign so that leads enter my LinkedIn outreach.
acceptanceCriteria: Push to HeyReach bulk action in toolbar
Confirmation dialog with count and campaign name
Field mapping applied, sender column respected
Batched at 100 leads per API call

userStories.title: Inbound Engagement Sync — Live Columns
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want to see HeyReach engagement data as columns in my ops table so I can track LinkedIn outreach without leaving 60.
acceptanceCriteria: Auto-create engagement columns on first webhook event

userStories.title: LinkedIn Activity Timeline
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want a chronological timeline of all LinkedIn interactions with a lead for full context.
acceptanceCriteria: View LinkedIn Activity button in row detail panel
Reverse chronological timeline with icons per event type

userStories.title: Ops Rules — Webhook Event Triggers
userStories.description: As a sales manager, I want automation rules triggered by HeyReach events so my team auto-follows up on LinkedIn engagement.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend trigger_type CHECK with 10 heyreach_ types
All action types work with HeyReach triggers

userStories.title: Auto-Push Rules
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want new leads matching criteria to auto-push to HeyReach so outreach starts without manual work.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter conditions on any cell value

userStories.title: Scheduled Sync
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want scheduled automatic pushes of new leads to HeyReach so my campaign always has fresh leads.
acceptanceCriteria: Schedule config UI with frequency picker

userStories.title: Webhook Health Monitoring
userStories.description: As an org admin, I want alerts if HeyReach webhooks stop so I can investigate before leads fall through.
acceptanceCriteria: Flags unhealthy if >24h silence with active campaigns
Green/yellow/red health indicator in config modal
